channel.title: Cats Can Dance — Blog
channel.description: Long-form guides on Bangalore's party scene, India's drop culture, and the Cats Can Dance brand — events and streetwear from Bangalore.

item.title: Limited Drops 101: Why Scarcity Sells
item.description: A field guide to drop culture for India's emerging streetwear and music brands — written from inside the room.

item.title: How Bangalore's Underground Brands Build Cult Followings
item.description: From RSVP nights to limited streetwear drops — the playbook independent Bangalore brands use to build real loyalty.

item.title: The Rise of Music Merch as Collectibles in India
item.description: Why a 2026 hoodie from a Bangalore party brand is the new vinyl — and how India's music merch culture finally caught up.

item.title: Inside the Cats Can Dance Streetwear Drop
item.description: How a Bangalore streetwear label turns a music night into a wearable archive.

item.title: Behind the Decks: Bangalore's Rising DJs
item.description: Six artists from Bangalore reshaping how the city sounds at 2am.

item.title: A Guide to Techno & House Nights in Bangalore
item.description: Where the city actually plays techno and house in 2026.

item.title: RSVP Culture: How Bangalore's Party Scene Works
item.description: Why the best nights in Bangalore aren't sold by the ticket.

item.title: Top 10 Event Organisers in India for Dance Music
item.description: The independent crews shaping India's dance music scene right now.

item.title: Where to Find Electronic Music Events in Bangalore
item.description: The actual sources Bangalore promoters use to fill rooms in 2026.

item.title: The Best Underground Parties in Bangalore (2026 Guide)
item.description: A working guide to where Bangalore actually dances when the lights go down.
